user_query: Have I received any emails in the last 7 days? List sender and subject.

plan.query: Have I received any emails in the last 7 days? List sender and subject.
plan.reasoning: The query requires checking email data for the last 7 days, which can be done directly using the graph agent to fetch the necessary information.

steps.task: Retrieve all emails received in the last 7 days, including the sender and subject for each email.

plan.synthesis: Compile the results to present the list of senders and subjects of the emails received in the last 7 days.

invoked_agents.input: Retrieve all emails received in the last 7 days, including the sender and subject for each email.
